var_MaxRecords.title: var_MaxRecords
var_MaxRecords.description: Maximum number of sites to return. Default 10 if blank

var_Region.title: var_Region
var_Region.description: State or city name to filter sites by e.g. Maharshtra or Mumbai

var_Status.title: var_Status
var_Status.description: Site Status Picklist value - E.g. Under review or scored. Leave blank to return all statuses
